prompt: A document review flow: pick a client, look through their uploaded documents, and verify or reject each one with a note to the client.
wire:
export default function DocumentReviewFlow() { const [clients, setClients] = useState([]); const [clientId, setClientId] = useState(""); const [client, setClient] = useState(null); const [docs, setDocs] = useState([]); const [loadingClient, setLoadingClient] = useState(false); const [actions, setActions] = useState({}); const [notes, setNotes] = useState({}); const [phases, setPhases] = useState({}); useEffect(() => { tools.host_listClients({}).then((r) => setClients(r.data || [])); }, []); useEffect(() => { if (!clientId) { setClient(null); setDocs([]); return; } setLoadingClient(true); Promise.all([ tools.host_getClient({ id: clientId }), tools.host_listClientDocuments({ id: clientId }), ]).then(([c, d]) => { setClient(c); const reviewable = (d.data || []).filter( (doc) => doc.status === "received" || doc.status === "needs_review" ); setDocs(reviewable); setLoadingClient(false); }); }, [clientId]); const reviewable = docs; const setAction = (docId, action) => setActions((prev) => ({ ...prev, [docId]: action })); const setNote = (docId, val) => setNotes((prev) => ({ ...prev, [docId]: val })); const submit = async (doc) => { const action = actions[doc.id]; if (!action) return; setPhases((prev) => ({ ...prev, [doc.id]: "sending" })); const body = { action, fileName: doc.fileName || doc.name || "", ...(action === "reject" ? { reason: notes[doc.id] || "" } : {}), }; const result = await tools.host_setDocumentStatus({ id: clientId, docId: doc.id, body }); const nextPhase = result && result.status === "pending-approval" ? "awaiting" : "done"; setPhases((prev) => ({ ...prev, [doc.id]: nextPhase })); if (nextPhase === "done") { setDocs((prev) => prev.filter((d) => d.id !== doc.id)); } if (notes[doc.id] && action === "reject") { await tools.host_sendClientMessage({ id: clientId, body: { body: notes[doc.id], author: "firm" }, }); } }; const statusColor = (s) => { if (s === "received") return "var(--vendo-color-accent)"; if (s === "needs_review") return "#b07a00"; return "var(--vendo-color-muted)"; }; const statusLabel = (s) => { if (s === "received") return "Received"; if (s === "needs_review") return "Needs review"; return s; }; return (
{/* Client picker */}

{/* Client summary */} {client && (
{client.name}
{client.entityType || ""}{client.assignedStaff ? ` · ${client.assignedStaff}` : ""}
{reviewable.length}
Awaiting review
{client.filingDeadline && (
{new Date(client.filingDeadline).toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric", year: "numeric" })}
Filing deadline
)}
)} {/* Loading */} {loadingClient && (
Loading documents…
)} {/* Empty state */} {!loadingClient && clientId && reviewable.length === 0 && (
No documents awaiting review for this client — nothing to action right now.
)} {/* Document cards */} {!loadingClient && reviewable.map((doc) => { const phase = phases[doc.id]; const action = actions[doc.id]; const isDone = phase === "done"; const isAwaiting = phase === "awaiting"; const isSending = phase === "sending"; return (
{/* Doc header */}
{doc.name || doc.type || "Document"}
{doc.fileName && (
File: {doc.fileName}
)} {doc.uploadedAt && (
Uploaded {new Date(doc.uploadedAt).toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric", year: "numeric" })}
)}
{statusLabel(doc.status)}
{/* Action buttons */} {!isDone && !isAwaiting && (
)} {/* Note field — always shown for reject, optional for verify */} {!isDone && !isAwaiting && action === "reject" && (
